Surname.jp: 主に忠実なオートマタ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率使目标<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Heals the selected ally's Health by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>.
description.jp: 味方単体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>回復させる。
description.zh: 使所选友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。

description.en: Heals all allies's Health by <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> and grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> that absorbs <color=#28d9ed>1500</color> damage for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 味方全体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>回復させ、<color=#28d9ed>1500</color>の<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 아군 전체의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> 회복시키고, <color=#28d9ed>1500</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.zh: 使全体友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>,并获得<color=#28d9ed>1500</color><color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> proportional to missing Health. <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> can increase up to <color=#28d9ed>160%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n残りHPが低いほど<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>がUPする。<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>は最大<color=#28d9ed>160%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高。<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>最多提升\n<color=#28d9ed>160%</color>。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Light

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Grants <color=#28d9ed>Continuous Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color> at the start of battle (Irremovable).
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>持続回復</color>を付与する。(解除不可)
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

战斗开始时,赋予<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。(无法解除)
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
